subcodes.first_line: The essence of remembrance and praise befitteth the sacred precincts of the Eternal One, Who through the nurturing rays of the Sun of Divine Unity hath caused the barren lands [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: جوهر ذکر و ثنا ساحت قدس لا یزالیرا لایق که بتربیت افتاب توحید اراضی جرزه
